note: First-person HUD thoughts displayed at key story beats. Short, optional flavor. Can be cut per pacing needs.

entries.beat: Waking in the cell — game start
entries.text: Cold floor. Standard restraints. Still breathing. They underestimated the Cold War — or just me.
These were people. Or supposed to be. Whatever they did to them, they did to me too.

entries.beat: After the guard takedown — gear acquired
entries.text: He's alive. Out cold. The keycard feels heavier than it should.

entries.beat: Reaching the shuttle in the docking bay
entries.text: Four hundred kilometers to Earth. The data is in my hands. Koschei doesn't die easy — that's always been the problem.
